title: Apinagia marowynensis
taxonomy: Apinagia marowynensis is classified under the family Podostemaceae, commonly known as the riverweed family. This family belongs to the order Podostemales, and subsequently, the class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledons. The class Magnoliopsida is part of the division Magnoliophyta, which is a group of flowering plants. The division Magnoliophyta is a subset of the kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all plant species. This classification places Apinagia marowynensis within the broader plant kingdom.
